description:
Legal query in Arabic script. The case is that of two brothers who inherit 3.5 shares in a property from their third brother, but upon selling their shares, they learn that the deceased brother had already sold 1 share in the property, so that each brother owned 0.5 less share than he thought he did.

The case is potentially connected to the document on the recto (PGPID 5335), a partnership agreement between two brothers, Abū al-Faḍl and Abū al-Riḍā Yosef b. Berakhot, who have inherited a sugar factory from their father and purchased the remainder from their brothers. The partnership agreement also references "Arabic documents" that allegedly detail the nature of the inheritance/purchase, as well as the dimensions of the property.
description_he: שאלה משפטית בערבית. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
